title: Quality Control Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger quality control foundations judgment so operations work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Quality Control Foundations is a leverage point inside operations. It supports the broader goal of process design, sops, delivery systems, and execution rhythm.
coreConcepts: Quality Control Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good quality control foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Quality Control Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
